ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Crime rate value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime rate data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the crime rate data */,
  "crime_types" TEXT /* Types of crimes included in the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning classification */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Zoning classification name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning classification */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the zoning classification became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the zoning classification expires */,
  "regulations" TEXT /* Summary of zoning regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industrial" (
  "industrial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industrial index */,
  "index" REAL /* Industrial index value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industrial presence */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the industrial index data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the industrial index data */,
  "industrial_types" TEXT /* Types of industries present */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industrial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employment center */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the property to the employment center */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the employment center is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the employment center is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of employment center */,
  "employment_count" INTEGER /* Number of people employed at the center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the employment center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the employment center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highways" (
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radial highway */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the radial highway */,
  "accessibility_index" INTEGER /* Accessibility index to the highway */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the highway is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the highway is located */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the highway segment */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the highway */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the highway segment */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the highway segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "pupil_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, investor, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company the user works for */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
